Name: outpath
Description: Path to the root directory containing the rank-wise binary output files. |br| This is ‘outPath‘ in the \*.in file.

Name: FEoutBase
Description: Base simulation name string used as a prefix for output filenames. |br| This is ‘outFileBase‘ in the \*.in file.

Name: numOutRanks
Description: Total number of GPUs used to run the simulation (integer). |br| This is ‘numProcsX*numProcsY‘ in the \*.in file.

Name: fileSetSize
Description: Number of files to be converted to netCDF (integer).

Name: tstart
Description: Simulation timestep where the file conversion starts (integer).

Name: tstep
Description: Timestep increment between output files to be converted (integer).

Name: netCDFpath
Description: Path to the root directory containing the domain-stitched and netCDF converted output files.

Name: removeBinaries
Description: Flag to remove the binary files as the conversion process proceeds (logical).
